Notes: Record after 48-hour string settle; retune if >10 cents off

Description: Neck deflection under full string load
Method: Feeler gauge / ruler at neck tip
Notes: Measure deflection from headstock to neck tip with all strings at playing tension

column11: Check at widest ring; thinner areas flagged for reinforcement

Description: Bridge stability — no rocking under tension
Notes: Measure string break angle at bridge ≥ 10°

Method: Tap test — uniform pitch across skin

Notes: Inspect at all 110 ring joints after lathe turning

Description: Neck fit in bowl entry hole
Notes: Drill bowl entry hole to neck OD + 0.005 in clearance

Description: Playing reach — farthest string from body
Notes: Test with intended player; Kamele 10 should sit like small banjo in lap

Description: Intonation at 12th fret position (if fretted option)
Notes: Ngoni is traditionally unfretted — this check only if frets added

Method: Formula check vs actual breakage on prototype
Notes: Flag if any string breaks at normal playing tension

Description: Pentatonic D-F-G-A-C pattern audible through 2 octaves
Target: Clean pentatonic; no beating between adjacent strings
